name: handle-pr
description: Autonomously handle GitHub PR review comments — evaluate, implement HIGH/MEDIUM changes, run tests, commit, reply to all threads.

interface.shortDescription: Autonomously handle GitHub PR review comments — evaluate, implement HIGH/MEDIUM changes, run tests, commit, reply to all threads.
interface.longDescription: Autonomously handle GitHub PR review comments — evaluate, implement HIGH/MEDIUM changes, run tests, commit, reply to all threads. Works best on a local machine with user-specific files and tools available.
defaultPrompt: Handle the PR review comments end-to-end: evaluate each thread, implement the worthwhile changes, run checks, and prepare replies.
